settings.heading: About MSA (Moon Style Apparel)
settings.text:
Established in 2012, MSA Sourcing is a trusted buying and sourcing agency based in Pakistan, offering comprehensive solutions for international buyers seeking high-quality garments, textiles, apparel, and accessories. As a leading private-sector Textile Export Promotion House, we specialise in promoting and facilitating the global export of Pakistani textile products, especially in knitwear, denim and leather.

With an integrated and total-solution approach, MSA Sourcing connects global buyers with reliable manufacturers, ensuring product quality, timely delivery, and smooth transactions. Our extensive network across Pakistan allows us to source a diverse range of textiles and apparel tailored to meet our clients' specific requirements.

As experienced buying agents, our team ensures our clients receive premium products within competitive timelines and at the best market prices. We offer access to a wide selection of original and up-to-date designs, supported by efficient logistics and stringent quality control through our collaboration with other companies.

At MSA Sourcing, our goal is to be your reliable partner in accessing the finest textile solutions Pakistan has to offer, efficiently, affordably, and with uncompromising quality.

settings.title: Our services include
settings.items:
Product sourcing
Quality assurance and inspection
Supply chain coordination
Bridging communication between buyers and manufacturers

settings.quote: MSA helped us streamline production with top-quality denim and knitwear, always on time and on budget.
settings.author: Excellent quality and communication

settings.quote: Their team ensured every detail was perfect. From samples to final delivery, everything was handled professionally.
settings.author: Trusted supplier network

settings.quote: Their manufacturing partners deliver consistently. We source bed sheets and curtains, always satisfied.
settings.author: Great experience with MSA

settings.title: Charitable partner — MSA with SAVE DC
settings.body:
At MSA, we believe that true business success is measured not just by profit but by leaving a positive impact on society. In partnership with Save the Deserving Children (SAVE DC), we sponsor orphaned and underprivileged children across Pakistan, providing completely free education including school fees, textbooks, uniforms, and regular health checkups.

This initiative supports the UN Sustainable Development Goals, particularly Quality Education (SDG 4) and Reduced Inequalities (SDG 10). Through SAVE DC's Sponsor a Child programme, companies and individuals can make a lasting difference — even a one-time sponsorship can secure a child's education for an entire year.

MSA & SAVE DC: Empowering tomorrow's leaders, today.
